name: Carrot-Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the all-purpose flour and whole wheat flour.
2. Add nonfat dry milk powder, baking powder, baking soda, salt, ground nutmeg, and ground cinnamon to the flour mixture. Stir until combined.
3. Cream the shortening and brown sugar in a separate bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in the egg, then mix in the molasses.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, stirring until well blended.
6. Fold in the shredded carrots, vanilla, and oats.
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Allow to cool on a wire rack.
